resources.string: You can’t save a search without a name

string.name: card_browser_search_hint
string.comment: Message displayed in the search text field in the card browser.

string.name: card_browser_cram_search
string.comment: Menu entry to start a search.

string.name: card_browser_truncate
string.comment: allows users to show less of a field value

string.name: set_due_date_hintText
string.comment: plural set_due_date_label_suffix is used for parameters, parameter 1 is the plural for 0, parameter 2 is the plural for 1

string.name: edit_tags_dialog
string.comment: Description of the shortcut that opens the edit tags dialog

string.name: show_order_dialog
string.comment: Description of the shortcut that shows the order dialog

string.name: card_browser_order_no_sorting_title
string.comment: Title of the 'no sorting' row in the Choose Display Order bottom sheet

string.name: card_browser_order_no_sorting_subtitle
string.comment: Subtitle for the 'no sorting' row noting that no-sort is faster than sorted queries

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_text_ascending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for text columns when ascending (A before Z)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_text_descending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for text columns when descending (Z before A)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_numeric_ascending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for numeric columns when ascending (smallest value first)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_numeric_descending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for numeric columns when descending (largest value first)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_date_ascending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for date columns when ascending (oldest entry first)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_date_descending
string.comment: Sort direction subtitle for date columns when descending (newest entry first)

string.name: sort_pill_label_text_ascending
string.comment: SortPill standard half marker for text columns. Use a 1-char glyph that suggests the start of the alphabet.

string.name: sort_pill_label_text_descending
string.comment: SortPill reverse half marker for text columns. Use a 1-char glyph that suggests the end of the alphabet.

string.name: sort_pill_label_numeric_ascending
string.comment: SortPill standard half marker for numeric columns. Use a 1-char glyph that suggests the smallest value.

string.name: sort_pill_label_numeric_descending
string.comment: SortPill reverse half marker for numeric columns. Use a 1-char glyph that suggests the largest value.

string.name: sort_pill_a11y_ascending
string.comment: SortPill accessibility: ascending half

string.name: sort_pill_a11y_descending
string.comment: SortPill accessibility: descending half

string.name: sort_pill_a11y_selected
string.comment: SortPill accessibility: state announcement when this half is the active sort direction

string.name: card_browser_order_section_unavailable
string.comment: Header: browser columns that cannot be sorted (e.g. Question)

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_use_sort_field
string.comment: Fix for when the 'Question/Answer' column is not sortable.

resources.string: Card content can\'t be sorted. Use Sort Field

string.name: card_browser_order_subtitle_cards_mode_only
string.comment: Fix for trying to sort on FSRS columns in Notes mode
